answers: A digital wallet is an electronic device or app that stores payment information, allowing you to make transactions digitally without physical cash or cards.
Digital wallet holo electronic wallet ja tomar phone e thake. Ekhane taka store kora jay, payment kora jay, ar cards save kora jay - Apple Pay, Google Pay, bKash erokom.
Popular digital wallets include Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay, PayPal, bKash, Nagad, and Rocket, each offering convenient cashless payment options.
Digital wallets use encryption and tokenization to protect your data. They're generally safer than carrying physical cards since your actual card numbers aren't shared during transactions.
